items.title: Project metadata and command entry: reject the misconception
items.prompt: Which statement is source-aligned for Python: Beginner to Intermediate and corrects this misconception? Adding any pyproject.toml automatically discovers every module, locks all dependencies, and proves the built wheel contains the working tree.

examEligibility.rationale: AI-assisted draft item; independent human source, technical, pedagogy, accessibility, and answer-oracle review is required before formal-exam eligibility.

hints: Compare each option with both the language-specific boundary case and the cited operational model.

feedback.correct: Correct. Treat pyproject metadata and backend configuration as a build contract, then inspect and test the built artifact in a fresh environment.
feedback.incorrect: That choice preserves the misconception. Treat pyproject metadata and backend configuration as a build contract, then inspect and test the built artifact in a fresh environment.

criteria.description: Selects the source-aligned correction and rejects the documented misconception.

privateAuthorNotes: A human reviewer must verify source fidelity and ensure the distractor remains plausible without teaching it as fact.
